judgment_delta: freshness concern -> passed because evidence-reuse is stale but fresh_use_allowed=false and used_as_fresh=false, while current verification timestamps are recorded against HEAD 12464d55053d3984751ac374121b32c849abed44.

command reliability concern -> passed because verification/remediation commands distinguish verification artifacts from agent review lifecycle artifacts, and the focused test asserts verify record, review prepare, review record, pr prepare, and absence of <story-id> fallback in rendered output.

gate binding concern -> passed because pr-prepare toolchain commit, gate artifact current.head_sha, verification git_context.head_sha, and local HEAD all match 12464d55053d3984751ac374121b32c849abed44.
regression_guard concern -> passed because typecheck and the focused CLI regression pass, and the test keeps legacy inconsistent_artifacts populated while adding stale_artifact_details/groups.

path_surface_coverage concern -> passed because implementation projects stale details into gate DAG payload, critical_unresolved_gates, execution_gate.required_actions, and human PR prepare summary; the test covers mixed verification and agent-review stale artifacts plus path-bound story id fallback.
